children.text: As a condition of the award of any financial assistance under , the recipient of any such loan or grant shall permit the United States to sue on behalf of such recipient any person determined by the Attorney General to be liable to the recipient for the costs of any activities undertaken by the recipient under such section.section 4014 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: the amount (i) outstanding on any loan and (ii) of any grant made to the recipient; and

children.label: B
children.text: an amount equal to the interest which would have been charged on such loan were the loan made by a commercial lender at prevailing interest rates (as determined by the Administrator).

children.heading: Expeditious recovery
children.label: b Expeditious recovery
children.text: The Attorney General shall, where appropriate, proceed in an expeditious manner to recover the amounts expended by the United States to carry out this subchapter from the persons identified by the Attorney General as being liable for such costs.
